headline: New Private-Credit Funds Are Being Launched Even as Redemptions Rise. Here’s Why.
summary: Most of the private credit funds launched recently were in the works before affection cooled for the category.

headline: T. ROWE PRICE EXPANDS FIXED INCOME INVESTMENT PLATFORM WITH NEW CLO OFFERING
summary: T. Rowe Price, a global investment management firm and leader in retirement, announced its entrance to the market as an issuer of collateralized loan obligations (CLOs)* with the debut of ROWE CLO 2026-1 Ltd., a US$403.59 million CLO secured primarily by broadly syndicated first-lien loans. The firm's activity in the CLO marketplace will be conducted through its investment adviser, T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc.

headline: T. Rowe Price 529 Refresh Highlights Education Focus And Valuation Upside Potential
summary: T. Rowe Price Group has renamed its long running college savings plan to "T. Rowe Price 529" to mark the plan's 25th anniversary. The firm has introduced a new $250 matching incentive program aimed at encouraging new and existing investors to fund education savings accounts. This move highlights a refreshed focus on education oriented clients and efforts to drive account growth and engagement. T. Rowe Price Group, trading under NasdaqGS:TROW, is putting fresh attention on a core retail...

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on T. Rowe Price Group, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Alex Bond   maintains T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $110 to $95.

headline: T. Rowe Price: Outflows Are Increasingly Structural
summary: T. Rowe Price sees entrenched net outflows since 2021, fee pressure, and target-date headwinds. Click here to read an analysis of TROW stock now.
